disclaimer.title:
TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF SERVICE
OOMA WELLNESS CLUB

10.title: Service modifications
10.p1: OOMA Wellness Club reserves the right to modify, at any time and whenever necessary for the proper functioning of the service:

11.title: Studio internal regulations
11.p1: The student undertakes to comply with the Studio's Internal Regulations, available on both the website and at the premises.
11.p2: Failure to comply may result in temporary or permanent suspension of access to the studio.

12.title: Personal data protection (GDPR)
12.p1: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD), you are informed that the personal data provided will be processed by OOMA Wellness Club for the following purposes:
12.p2: Data will not be shared with third parties, except as required by law or when necessary for the proper provision of the service.
12.p3: The user may exercise their rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, objection and portability by request to:
12.p4: The user declares having been informed about the processing of their personal data and accepts its use under the stated terms.

13.title: Acceptance of terms and conditions
13.p1: Registering on the web platform or app implies having read, understood, and fully accepted these Terms and Conditions.
13.p2: OOMA Wellness Club reserves the right to modify this document at any time, in order to adapt it to service improvements or regulatory changes.

01.title: Purpose
01.p1: These Terms and Conditions govern access to, booking of, and participation in the activities offered by OOMA Wellness Club, as well as the use of its facilities and associated services.
01.p2: Registering on the web platform or app, as well as booking activities, implies full and unreserved acceptance of these terms.

02.title: Health conditions and personal responsibility
02.p1: Participation in activities is carried out under the sole responsibility of the student.
02.p2: The user declares that they are in adequate physical condition to engage in physical exercise.
02.p3: The student also undertakes to inform the studio in advance of any relevant health circumstances, including but not limited to:
02.p4: In the case of pregnancy, the student declares that they have medical authorisation to engage in physical exercise.
02.p5: OOMA Wellness Club is not a medical or rehabilitation centre, and the activities offered do not replace medical treatment, diagnosis, or clinical procedures in any way.
02.p6: The instructor may adapt exercises, limit, or prevent the student's participation whenever deemed necessary for safety, whether individual or collective.

03.title: Previous injuries and informed consent
03.p1: In the case of a previous injury or relevant medical condition, OOMA Wellness Club may require the signing of an additional informed consent and liability waiver document as a prerequisite for participation in activities.
03.p2: Admission to the activity is in all cases subject to the instructor's assessment.

04.title: Bookings, cancellations and credits
04.p1: Classes may be cancelled or rescheduled without penalty up to 2 hours before their start time.
04.p2: Cancellations made less than 2 hours before the start, as well as non-attendance at a booked session, will result in the automatic loss of the credit, with no right to recovery or refund.

05.title: Punctuality and class access
05.p1: For organisational and safety reasons, access to the class will not be permitted once 10 minutes have elapsed since its start.
05.p2: In such case, the session shall be considered consumed for all purposes.

06.title: Reformer assignment
06.p1: Reformer assignment is carried out automatically through the booking system.
06.p2: The student must use exclusively the assigned reformer.
06.p3: Modifying this assignment without the instructor's express authorisation is not permitted.

07.title: Right of admission and limitation of participation
07.p1: OOMA Wellness Club reserves the right of admission, as well as the right to limit or suspend participation in activities when there is a risk to the safety of the student, other participants, or when the studio's rules are breached.

08.title: Personal belongings
08.p1: OOMA Wellness Club accepts no responsibility for the loss, theft, damage, or deterioration of personal belongings within its premises.

09.title: Coffee corner and merchandise
09.p1: Products available in the coffee corner and the merchandise area are not included in the price of classes or memberships.
09.p2: All products must be paid for prior to consumption or collection.
09.p3: OOMA Wellness Club reserves the right to claim the corresponding amount in the event of consumption or collection without prior payment.
